Place the following files from face-api.js v0.22.2 in this directory:

  public/vendor/face-api/
  └── face-api.min.js               ← https://github.com/justadudewhohacks/face-api.js/releases/tag/v0.22.2

  public/vendor/face-api/weights/
  ├── tiny_face_detector_model-weights_manifest.json
  ├── tiny_face_detector_model-shard1
  ├── face_landmark_68_model-weights_manifest.json
  ├── face_landmark_68_model-shard1
  ├── face_recognition_model-weights_manifest.json   (optional — matching is server-side)
  └── face_recognition_model-shard1                  (optional)

Download from:
  https://github.com/justadudewhohacks/face-api.js/tree/master/weights

Or the CDN-mirrored package:
  npm pack face-api.js@0.22.2  →  extract ./weights/ folder

IMPORTANT: Do NOT use CDN URLs in production — all script and model loads
must come from your own server (asset() calls in the blade templates already
point to public/vendor/face-api/).
